name: SGLT2 Inhibitor Cohort â€” Type 2 Diabetes + Chronic Kidney Disease
description: Computable phenotype for identifying adults with co-occurring type 2 diabetes mellitus and chronic kidney disease who receive SGLT2 inhibitor therapy, using ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, RxNorm medication codes, and LOINC laboratory concepts applied to synthetic FHIR R4 patient data.
clinical_intent: Descriptive retrospective cohort characterization for SGLT2 inhibitor research methodology demonstration. Not for clinical decision support or patient management.

concepts.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus Diagnosis
concepts.clinical_intent: Index condition â€” patient must have documented T2DM diagnosis within the lookback period
concepts.notes: ICD-10-CM E11.* subcategories included. Type 1 diabetes (E10.*) is not included.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; most common T2DM code in administrative data
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Code text is well-established in ICD-10-CM tabular; verification against FY2024 file pending.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; included because documented hyperglycemia commonly co-occurs in T2DM+CKD records
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Note: E11.65 = hyperglycemia (not a CKD combination code). Use alongside N18.x codes.

mappings.concept_name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic nephropathy
mappings.description: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic nephropathy
mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; diabetic nephropathy combination code capturing both T2DM and kidney complication
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Combination code; also assign N18.x for CKD stage per ICD-10-CM coding guidelines.

concepts.name: Chronic Kidney Disease Diagnosis (Stages 1â€“5)
concepts.clinical_intent: Co-condition â€” patient must have documented CKD (stages 1â€“5) to qualify; ESRD (stage 5D/N18.6) triggers exclusion rule
concepts.notes: N18.6 (ESRD) is explicitly excluded via exclusion rule c-esrd-exclude. N18.9 (unspecified) is included as a fallback.

mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Code text is well-established in ICD-10-CM tabular.
Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review.
Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review.
Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review.
Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; stage 5 without dialysis (pre-ESRD) is included
mappings.notes: Candidate â€” clinical review required to confirm stage 5 (pre-dialysis) inclusion criteria.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; included as fallback when specific CKD stage is not documented
mappings.notes: Candidate â€” may reduce cohort specificity; consider excluding for stage-specific analyses.

concepts.name: SGLT2 Inhibitor Medication
concepts.clinical_intent: Index exposure â€” at least one qualifying prescription on or after the index date
concepts.notes: RxNorm ingredient-level concepts used for broad capture. All four RxCUI values are LLM-suggested from training data and HAVE NOT been verified against the live RxNorm API. Verification is required before any production use. See verification_date=null on each mapping.

mappings.source_or_rationale: RxNorm ingredient concept for empagliflozin; covers Jardiance and Synjardy. RxCUI derived from LLM training data â€” pending live RxNorm API verification.
mappings.notes: CANDIDATE â€” LLM-suggested RxCUI. Must verify RxCUI 1545653 = empagliflozin ingredient via https://rxnav.nlm.nih.gov/REST/rxcui/1545653/properties before production use.

mappings.source_or_rationale: RxNorm ingredient concept for dapagliflozin; covers Farxiga. RxCUI derived from LLM training data â€” pending live RxNorm API verification.
mappings.notes: CANDIDATE â€” LLM-suggested RxCUI. Must verify RxCUI 1488564 is the ingredient-level concept for dapagliflozin (not a product-level code) via RxNorm API.

mappings.source_or_rationale: RxNorm ingredient concept for canagliflozin; covers Invokana. RxCUI derived from LLM training data â€” pending live RxNorm API verification.
mappings.notes: CANDIDATE â€” LLM-suggested RxCUI. Must verify RxCUI 1373458 is ingredient-level for canagliflozin via RxNorm API.

mappings.source_or_rationale: RxNorm ingredient concept for ertugliflozin; covers Steglatro. RxCUI derived from LLM training data â€” pending live RxNorm API verification.
mappings.notes: CANDIDATE â€” LLM-suggested RxCUI. Less clinical trial evidence for ertugliflozin in CKD. Verify RxCUI 2043678 via RxNorm API; review inclusion criteria carefully.

concepts.name: Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate (eGFR)
concepts.clinical_intent: Baseline and follow-up laboratory measurement for CKD staging and outcome assessment
concepts.notes: LOINC codes for eGFR are candidate mappings. Different eGFR equations (CKD-EPI, MDRD) use different LOINC codes. CKD-EPI 2021 is the current standard per KDIGO 2022.

mappings.description: Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum, Plasma or Blood by CKD-EPI 2021 equation
mappings.source_or_rationale: LOINC tabular list; CKD-EPI 2021 equation is current standard per KDIGO 2022 guidelines. LOINC code from published LOINC table.
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” verify LOINC v2.77 code and local lab mapping before production use. Well-known LOINC code; verification against loinc.org pending.

mappings.description: Glomerular filtration rate/1.73 sq M.predicted [Volume Rate/Area] in Serum, Plasma or Blood by MDRD formula
mappings.source_or_rationale: LOINC tabular list; MDRD is legacy equation, may appear in older data from pre-2012 records
mappings.notes: Candidate â€” MDRD is less accurate at higher eGFR values; prefer CKD-EPI 2021 where available. Verification pending.

mappings.source_or_rationale: LOINC tabular list; UACR is a key CKD severity marker per KDIGO 2022 heat map (eGFR + albuminuria staging)
mappings.notes: Candidate â€” UACR is a secondary outcome variable, not the primary CKD staging criterion. Verification pending.

concepts.name: End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD)
concepts.clinical_intent: Exclusion criterion â€” patients with ESRD are not eligible for this cohort per phenotype rule exc-001
concepts.notes: N18.6 is the ICD-10-CM code for ESRD; patients with this code at or before index date are excluded. Added in v0.3.0 to operationalize exclusion rule exc-001.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; standard code for ESRD used as exclusion per phenotype eligibility criteria
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Code text is well-established in ICD-10-CM. Added to operationalize exclusion rule exc-001 (ESRD exclusion).

concepts.name: Dialysis or Renal Replacement Therapy
concepts.clinical_intent: Exclusion criterion â€” patients on dialysis are not eligible per phenotype rule exc-002
concepts.notes: Z99.2 captures dialysis dependence as a diagnosis code in ICD-10-CM. Added in v0.3.0 to operationalize exclusion rule exc-002.

mappings.source_or_rationale: ICD-10-CM FY2024 tabular list; status code for ongoing dialysis dependence used as exclusion criterion
mappings.notes: Candidate mapping â€” requires clinical review. Code text is well-established in ICD-10-CM. Added to operationalize exclusion rule exc-002 (dialysis exclusion).

concepts.label: Adult age (18+)
concepts.description: Patient is an adult (age >= 18 years) at the index date
concepts.name: Adult age (18+)
concepts.clinical_intent: Restrict cohort to adults; handled via CohortConfiguration.min_age_years parameter

inclusion_rules.label: T2DM diagnosis
inclusion_rules.logic: At least 1 ICD-10-CM code from the T2DM concept (E11.*) recorded in Condition resource within the lookback period

inclusion_rules.label: CKD diagnosis (stages 1â€“5)
inclusion_rules.logic: At least 1 ICD-10-CM code from the CKD concept (N18.1â€“N18.5, N18.9) recorded in Condition resource within the lookback period; N18.6 (ESRD) triggers exclusion rule

inclusion_rules.label: SGLT2 inhibitor prescription
inclusion_rules.logic: At least 1 MedicationRequest with RxNorm code from the SGLT2 concept on or after the index date

inclusion_rules.label: Age 18 or older at index
inclusion_rules.logic: Patient birth date implies age 18 years or older at the index date

exclusion_rules.label: End-stage renal disease (ESRD)
exclusion_rules.logic: Any ICD-10-CM code N18.6 (end stage renal disease) in Condition resource at or before the index date

exclusion_rules.label: Dialysis or renal replacement therapy
exclusion_rules.logic: Any Condition resource with ICD-10-CM code Z99.2 (dependence on renal dialysis) at or before the index date

fhir_mappings.notes: Match on prefix E11 to capture all T2DM subcategory codes
Match on prefix N18 then filter by stage code; exclude N18.6
Match on ingredient-level RxNorm codes; use RxNorm expand API to retrieve product codes. All RxCUIs are LLM-suggested and require verification.
Primary eGFR LOINC code (CKD-EPI 2021); supplement with 33914-3 for legacy data

index_date_definition: Date of the first qualifying SGLT2 inhibitor prescription (MedicationRequest) on or after the patient's first qualifying T2DM + CKD co-diagnosis date
changelog: 0.3.0 (2026-06-29): Added c-esrd concept (N18.6) and c-dialysis concept (Z99.2) to operationalize exclusion rules exc-001 and exc-002; updated exc-001.concept_id=c-esrd, exc-002.concept_id=c-dialysis; exc-002 logic changed from CPT Procedure references to ICD-10-CM Z99.2 Condition reference for FHIR R4 implementation consistency

0.2.0 (2025-06-29): Added verification_date and verification_source fields (all null â€” pending); corrected E11.65 concept_name from 'diabetic chronic kidney disease' to 'with hyperglycemia' (correct ICD-10-CM description); marked all 4 RxNorm codes as is_llm_suggested=true (RxCUIs from LLM training data, unverified via live API)
0.1.0 (2025-01-15): Initial draft phenotype definition; all mappings are candidate status pending clinical review
